summary: Nested `if` statements place conditional blocks inside each other. Flatten deep nesting using guard clauses.
oneLineSummary: Nested conditions evaluate hierarchical rules; flatten deep trees using early returns.

memoryTricks.trick: Think of Russian nesting dolls — open the outer doll first before reaching the inner doll.

preInterviewChecklist: Explain how to refactor deep nesting
